nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT fc_p.employee_erp_id AS preparer_employee_id, fc.name AS preparer_name, bc.id AS board_id, bc.name AS board_name
FROM   faculty_cache       fc_p
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc_p.id
JOIN   answer_key          ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc_p.id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = bc.board_id
JOIN   question_paper qp ON qp.id = b.qp_id
WHERE  akp.faculty_cache_id = bc.faculty_cache_id
  AND  akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
  AND  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  bc.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
ORDER  BY fc_p.employee_erp_id, bc.id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (answer_key, question_paper, board, board_coordinator, faculty_cache). You must qualify it with a table alias.
